title: Speaks for the Land
summary: Your spiritual connection to nature and the environment grants you mystical abilities.
tiers: Tier 3: Soothe the Savage or Communication
Tier 6: Call the Storm or Earthquake
gm_intrusions: An injured natural (but dangerous) creature is discovered. Someone’s poaching wildlife for their skins, leaving the carcasses to rot. A tree falls in the forest, one of the last elder trees.
text: Your spiritual connection to nature and the environment grants you mystical abilities.
details: Your spiritual connection to nature and the environment grants you mystical abilities.
